title: Device Home Screen - Battery Charging Icon
scenario: Device Home Screen battery icon shows percentage when not charging, switches to bolt icon when charger connected, and reverts to percentage when charger disconnected
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset or earbuds are connected and NOT connected to a charger.
3. Observe the battery icon displayed on the Home screen for the connected device.
4. Connect the headset/earbuds to a charger (e.g., USB cable).
5. Observe the battery icon on the Home screen again.
6. Disconnect the charger from the headset/earbuds.
7. Observe the battery icon on the Home screen once more.
expected: When not charging, the battery icon shows the battery percentage value. When the device is connected to a charger, the battery icon changes to display a bolt icon instead of the percentage value. When the charger is disconnected, the bolt icon disappears and the percentage value returns.
